---
id: read-chat-reactions
title: "Read reactions"
description: "Marks unread reactions in the chat as seen. Pass an empty body to mark every unread reaction."
sidebar_label: "Read reactions"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/reference/2025-11-08/anytype-api

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Read reactions"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/spaces/{space_id}/chats/{chat_id}/reactions/read"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Marks unread reactions in the chat as seen. Pass an empty body to mark every unread reaction.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
